body: Completed task-graph-fix-crash-and-duplicates: Fixed two bugs in src/core/graph.ts. (1) loadGraphData now wraps JSON.parse in try/catch to handle malformed JSON gracefully instead of crashing. (2) findImpactHints now tracks processed nodes to avoid duplicate hints when multiple path_hints match the same node. Also removed dead code: graph_data_invalid error code from result.ts and unnecessary !graph.concepts check. Added 2 tests (malformed JSON handling, deduplication). All 117 tests pass, typecheck clean, biome clean, validate clean.
